# WebWaka OS — Verticals Execution Prompts: Health Extended

**Document type:** Agent execution prompt set
**Scope:** Health extended verticals — 6 verticals covered
**Repo:** https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os
**Branch base:** `main`
**Milestone targets:** M9–M12
**Status:** Ready for agent execution — P1 Health verticals complete (M8e)
**Generated by:** MASTER_CONTINUATION_PROMPT.md — Set F

---

> **3-in-1 Platform Note:**
> Health verticals serve **Pillar 1 (Ops)** and **Pillar 3 (Marketplace/Discovery)**. Branded clinical sites activate **Pillar 2**.
> **SuperAgent AI is cross-cutting — NOT a fourth pillar.**
> **CRITICAL AI GOVERNANCE FOR HEALTH VERTICALS:**
> - Clinical/patient-adjacent AI output: **L3 HITL maximum**
> - Operational (appointment/scheduling) AI output: L2 maximum
> - **P13 is the hardest rule in this set:** Patient names, diagnoses, medications, clinical results, and any identifiable health data must NEVER be passed to SuperAgent. Only de-identified reference IDs and aggregate statistics are permissible.
> - NDPR consent required for all AI features (P10); USSD excluded (P12)
> See `docs/governance/3in1-platform-architecture.md` and the ADL clinical AI cap decision.

### General rules for all agents using these prompts

- Never make assumptions about WebWaka's architecture. Always read the referenced documents and code first.
- Research deeply — MDCN, VCNB, NDLEA, PCN, and NPHCDA regulatory workflows before implementing any route or transition guard.
- P13 is the highest-priority invariant in this set: health data is the most sensitive category of PII under NDPR.
- Every monetary value must be an integer in kobo (P9). Consultation fees, treatment costs, medication prices must not use floats.
- No cross-tenant data leakage (T3). Every D1 query scopes to `tenant_id`.

---

## TASK V-HLT-EXT-1: Dental Clinic / Orthodontist Vertical

- **Module / vertical:** `packages/verticals` + vertical slug `dental-clinic`
- **Priority:** P2-Top100 — Growing dental care market in Nigerian cities driven by rising middle class; dental clinics in Lagos, Abuja, Port Harcourt; MDCN registration mandatory
- **Milestone target:** M9
- **Primary pillars:** Pillar 1 (Ops) + Pillar 2 (Branding) + Pillar 3 (Marketplace)
- **`primary_pillars` value:** `["ops","branding","marketplace"]`
- **GitHub context:**
  - Verticals master plan: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/docs/governance/verticals-master-plan.md
  - 3-in-1 platform architecture: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/docs/governance/3in1-platform-architecture.md
  - Verticals FSM engine: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/packages/verticals/src/
  - Platform invariants: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/docs/governance/platform-invariants.md
  - Entitlement model: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/docs/governance/entitlement-model.md
  - AI integration framework: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/docs/governance/ai-integration-framework.md
  - SuperAgent product spec: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/docs/governance/superagent/02-product-spec.md
  - Clinic vertical (M8e reference): https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/packages/verticals-clinic/

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in dental practice management software and healthcare SaaS, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:**
- Nigerian dental sector — MDCN (Medical and Dental Council of Nigeria) dentist registration, ADSN (Association of Dental Surgeons of Nigeria) membership, NDA (Nigerian Dental Association), PCN-registered dental consumables
- Clinical AI governance — patient data must never reach AI layer (P13 + NDPR); clinical output at L3 HITL; operational scheduling at L2
- Appointment booking, treatment record reference IDs (not clinical content), billing in kobo
- Cloudflare Workers + Hono + D1 TypeScript strict mode; WebWaka SuperAgent integration; Verticals FSM engine
- Reference M8e clinic vertical in `packages/verticals-clinic/` for base pattern

---

**1. Mandatory context reading (100% before execution):**

- `docs/governance/verticals-master-plan.md` — Health verticals; entry for `dental-clinic`
- `docs/governance/3in1-platform-architecture.md`
- `docs/governance/platform-invariants.md` — P2, P9, P10, P12, **P13 (read carefully — health data)**, T3, T4
- `docs/governance/ai-architecture-decision-log.md` — ADL clinical AI cap rule
- `infra/db/seeds/0004_verticals-master.csv` — row for `dental-clinic`
- `packages/verticals/src/` — FSM engine; `packages/auth/src/guards.ts`
- `docs/governance/ai-integration-framework.md`; `infra/db/migrations/` — next migration number
- `packages/verticals-clinic/src/` — reference M8e base clinic pattern

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Research tasks:
- Nigerian dental market — MDCN registered dentists count, dental clinic density in Lagos/Abuja, average consultation fee (₦5,000–₦50,000), orthodontic treatment cost range, insurance coverage penetration
- Competitors: no dominant Nigerian dental SaaS; Dentrix (global), DentiMax, local Excel/WhatsApp management
- Key features: patient appointment booking (patient_ref_id — never name in AI), dentist schedule, treatment type log (cleaning/filling/extraction/orthodontics/implant), consultation_fee_kobo, treatment_cost_kobo, lab work referral reference, MDCN registration tracking per dentist
- MDCN registration, NDA/ADSN membership, PCN-registered dental products, NDPR health data consent

Execution plan:
- **Objective:** Give Nigerian dental clinics digital appointment management, treatment billing, dentist schedule, and MDCN compliance records — with P13-compliant AI operational insights
- **Schema:**
  - `dental_clinic_profiles` — clinic_name, MDCN_facility_reg, ADSN_membership, CAC_RC, workspace_id, tenant_id, status
  - `dental_dentists` — dentist_ref_id (not name — use ref), MDCN_reg_number, specialisation, status, tenant_id
  - `dental_appointments` — patient_ref_id TEXT (never store name — use opaque ref), dentist_ref_id, appointment_time INTEGER, treatment_type (cleaning/filling/extraction/orthodontics/xray/consultation), consultation_fee_kobo, status (booked/confirmed/attended/cancelled/no_show), tenant_id
  - `dental_treatments` — appointment_id, treatment_cost_kobo, lab_ref TEXT, notes_ref TEXT (encrypted blob reference — never raw clinical notes in main DB), tenant_id
- **FSM states:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `mdcn_verified` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `APPOINTMENT_OPTIMIZATION` (peak hour analysis on aggregate data) — L2; `PATIENT_FLOW_REPORT` (clinic utilisation) — L2; **L3 HITL if any output is treatment-adjacent** — NDPR consent; USSD excluded (P12)
- **CRITICAL P13:** patient_ref_id is an opaque UUID — never the patient name. No treatment types, diagnoses, or clinical notes passed to AI. Only aggregate appointment counts, revenue by treatment category, and slot utilisation rates.
- **Regulatory hook:** MDCN facility registration number + ADSN at `mdcn_verified`
- **KYC:** Tier 2 for treatment billing; Tier 3 for dental insurance claims operations

---

**3. Implementation workflow:**

Branch: `feat/vertical-dental-clinic` from `main`.

**3a. Schema:** `[NEXT_NUMBER]_vertical_dental_clinic.sql`. Patient ref as opaque TEXT (UUID). All monetary in kobo (P9). `tenant_id NOT NULL` (T3). Clinical notes stored as encrypted blob reference — raw text never in D1.

**3b. Package:** `packages/verticals-dental-clinic/src/index.ts` — `registerDentalClinicVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`. FSM: `seeded` → `claimed` → `mdcn_verified` → `active` → `suspended`. AI calls: aggregate appointment counts and revenue by treatment category ONLY — no patient_ref_id, no treatment type details (P13). L2 for scheduling; L3 HITL if patient outcomes are queried.

**3c. Routes:** `apps/api/src/routes/verticals/dental-clinic.ts`. Full CRUD for appointments, dentists, treatments (billing only). AI advisory on USSD blocked (P12). Mount in `apps/api/src/index.ts`.

**3d. T3:** All D1 queries scoped to `tenant_id`.

---

**4. QA and verification:**

**Test file:** `packages/verticals-dental-clinic/src/dental-clinic.test.ts`

Positive: register; FSM to `mdcn_verified` with MDCN facility reg; appointment with opaque patient_ref_id and integer consultation_fee_kobo (P9); treatment billing with integer treatment_cost_kobo; AI appointment flow report with aiRights + NDPR on aggregate data only. Negative: fractional kobo (P9); cross-tenant → 403 (T3); AI with patient name in payload → blocked (P13 test); AI triply blocked (aiRights, NDPR, USSD); `mdcn_verified` without MDCN number → typed error; invalid FSM → typed error (T4). Security: unauth → 401; KYC → 403.

**CRITICAL TEST:** Verify that any SuperAgent call from this vertical does NOT include patient_ref_id, treatment_type details, or clinical notes in the prompt payload. This is a blocking P13 violation if it occurs.

**Minimum test count: 15 tests.**

---

**5. Finalize and push:**

```bash
git commit -m "feat(vertical/dental-clinic): Dental Clinic vertical — appointments, MDCN compliance, P13-safe AI insights (M9)"
git push origin feat/vertical-dental-clinic
```
PR checklist:
- [ ] Vertical registered in FSM
- [ ] Migration: patient_ref_id is opaque UUID — clinical data protection verified
- [ ] `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`
- [ ] PR labeled: `3in1:pillar-1`, `3in1:pillar-2`, `3in1:pillar-3`
- [ ] P13 test: AI payload explicitly verified to exclude patient data
- [ ] L3 HITL flag set for any patient-adjacent AI route
- [ ] USSD exclusion enforced (P12); NDPR consent gated (P10)
- [ ] T3 on all D1 queries; KYC guards correct
- [ ] Tests ≥ 15, all passing
- [ ] Zero typecheck/lint errors

## TASK V-HLT-EXT-2: Sports Academy / Fitness Centre Vertical

- **Module / vertical:** `packages/verticals` + vertical slug `sports-academy`
- **Priority:** P2-Top100 — Fitness culture growing in Nigerian cities; gyms, fitness studios, sports academies, martial arts clubs; state sports council and fitness association oversight
- **Milestone target:** M10
- **Primary pillars:** Pillar 1 (Ops) + Pillar 2 (Branding) + Pillar 3 (Marketplace)
- **`primary_pillars` value:** `["ops","branding","marketplace"]`
- **GitHub context:** (standard links as above)

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in sports and fitness facility management software, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:**
- Nigerian fitness and sports academy sector — gym culture in Lagos VI/Ikoyi, Abuja Wuse, Port Harcourt GRA; state sports council awareness, NIRSA (Nigerian Recreation and Sports Association), fitness instructor certification
- Membership management, class scheduling, trainer assignment, equipment inventory in kobo
- Cloudflare Workers + Hono + D1 TypeScript strict mode; WebWaka SuperAgent integration; Verticals FSM engine
- P13: member health data (weight, body metrics) if collected must never reach AI layer

---

**1. Mandatory context reading (100% before execution):**

All standard documents + `docs/governance/ai-architecture-decision-log.md` for health AI cap.

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Research tasks: Nigerian fitness market — gym density in Lagos, average membership fee (₦10,000–₦50,000/month), class-based (spin, aerobics, Zumba) vs open gym models, sports academies (football, basketball, tennis for youth); competitor tools: Mindbody, Glofox (used by upscale Lagos gyms), WhatsApp management for smaller gyms; key features: member roster, membership plan (monthly/quarterly/annual, fee_kobo), class schedule, trainer-to-class assignment, attendance check-in, equipment maintenance log, state sports council permit.

Execution plan:
- **Objective:** Give Nigerian sports academies and gyms digital membership management, class scheduling, trainer assignment, and equipment tracking — with AI utilisation analysis
- **Schema:**
  - `sports_academy_profiles` — academy_name, type (gym/football_academy/tennis/martial_arts/other), state_sports_permit, CAC_RC, workspace_id, tenant_id, status
  - `sports_members` — member_ref_id TEXT (opaque), membership_plan (monthly/quarterly/annual), plan_fee_kobo, valid_until INTEGER, status (active/lapsed/suspended), tenant_id
  - `sports_classes` — class_name, trainer_id, schedule_day, schedule_time, capacity, enrolled_count, class_fee_kobo (if pay-per-class), tenant_id
  - `sports_checkins` — member_ref_id, check_date INTEGER, class_id, tenant_id
  - `sports_equipment` — equipment_name, quantity, purchase_cost_kobo, last_service_date INTEGER, tenant_id
- **FSM states:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `permit_verified` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `APPOINTMENT_OPTIMIZATION` (class peak-time analysis on aggregate), `PATIENT_FLOW_REPORT` adapted as `MEMBER_FLOW_REPORT` — L2; Growth plan; no member health metrics to AI (P13)
- **Regulatory hook:** State sports permit at `permit_verified`; CAC RC stored
- **KYC:** Tier 1 for cash membership; Tier 2 for annual subscriptions via card/transfer above ₦200,000

---

**3. Implementation:**

Branch: `feat/vertical-sports-academy`. `registerSportsAcademyVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`. Member health data (if any — weight, BMI) must never reach AI (P13). Monetary in kobo (P9). Tenant scoped (T3). USSD excluded (P12).

---

**4. QA:**

**Test file:** `packages/verticals-sports-academy/src/sports-academy.test.ts`

Positive: register; FSM to `permit_verified`; member with integer plan_fee_kobo; class with integer class_fee_kobo; check-in recorded; equipment with integer purchase_cost_kobo; AI utilisation report with aiRights + NDPR (aggregate only). Negative: fractional kobo; cross-tenant → 403; AI with health metrics → P13 blocked; AI triply blocked; invalid FSM → typed error. Unauth → 401; KYC → 403.

**Minimum test count: 15 tests.**

---

**5. Push:** `git commit -m "feat(vertical/sports-academy): Sports Academy vertical — memberships, class scheduling, AI utilisation (M10)"`. PR checklist: P13 health data exclusion tested, FSM, migration, standard checks.

## TASK V-HLT-EXT-3: Veterinary Clinic / Pet Shop Vertical

- **Module / vertical:** `packages/verticals` + vertical slug `vet-clinic`
- **Priority:** P2-Top100 — Growing pet ownership in Nigerian cities (dogs, cats, poultry); VCNB-licensed vets; also pet shops selling food, accessories
- **Milestone target:** M10
- **Primary pillars:** Pillar 1 (Ops) + Pillar 2 (Branding) + Pillar 3 (Marketplace)
- **`primary_pillars` value:** `["ops","branding","marketplace"]`
- **GitHub context:** (standard links)

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in veterinary practice and pet retail management, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:**
- Nigerian veterinary sector — VCNB (Veterinary Council of Nigeria Board) registration, FMARD animal health division, NAFDAC for veterinary drugs; pet ownership predominantly in Lagos/Abuja; livestock vet vs companion animal vet
- Appointment booking, vaccination record, prescription reference, pet shop inventory in kobo
- Cloudflare Workers + Hono + D1 TypeScript strict mode; WebWaka SuperAgent integration; Verticals FSM engine
- P13: patient animal clinical records — de-identified animal_ref_id; no diagnosis details to AI

---

**1. Mandatory context reading:** All standard documents.

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Research tasks: Nigerian vet market — VCNB registered vets, Lagos pet clinic density, companion animal vs livestock split, average consultation fee; pet shop market (Domino Pet Store, Petshop Nigeria); key features: patient register (animal_ref_id, species, breed, owner_ref_id), appointment booking (appointment_time, vet_id, type (consultation/vaccination/surgery/grooming)), consultation_fee_kobo, vaccination schedule, prescription reference ID, pet shop inventory (pet_food, accessories, unit_price_kobo), VCNB registration tracking.

Execution plan:
- **Schema:** `vet_clinic_profiles` (clinic_name, VCNB_registration, CAC_RC, clinic_type (companion/livestock/both), workspace_id, tenant_id, status); `vet_patients` (animal_ref_id TEXT, species, breed, owner_ref_id TEXT, age_months INTEGER, tenant_id); `vet_appointments` (animal_ref_id, vet_id, appointment_time INTEGER, appointment_type, consultation_fee_kobo, status (booked/attended/cancelled), tenant_id); `vet_vaccinations` (animal_ref_id, vaccine_name, date_administered INTEGER, next_due INTEGER, cost_kobo, tenant_id); `vet_shop_inventory` (product_name, category (food/accessory/medication), unit_price_kobo, quantity_in_stock, tenant_id)
- **FSM:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `vcnb_verified` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `APPOINTMENT_OPTIMIZATION` (appointment peak analysis), `DEMAND_PLANNING` (pet shop inventory reorder) — L2; Growth plan; animal_ref_id and species passed as aggregate stats only — no diagnosis (P13)
- **KYC:** Tier 1 for consultation billing; Tier 2 for surgical procedures above ₦100,000

---

**3. Implementation:** Branch `feat/vertical-vet-clinic`. `registerVetClinicVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`. All monetary in kobo (P9). Animal ref as opaque UUID. Tenant scoped (T3). No clinical diagnosis to AI (P13). USSD excluded (P12).

---

**4. QA:** Register; FSM to `vcnb_verified`; patient registered with opaque animal_ref_id; appointment with integer consultation_fee_kobo; vaccination with integer cost_kobo; shop item with integer unit_price_kobo; AI demand with aiRights + NDPR (aggregate species stats only); clinical details not passed to AI (P13); fractional kobo rejected; cross-tenant 403; AI triply blocked; invalid FSM typed error. Unauth 401; KYC 403. **Minimum: 15 tests.**

---

**5. Push:** `git commit -m "feat(vertical/vet-clinic): Vet Clinic vertical — patient register, appointments, vaccination, pet shop (M10)"`. PR checklist: P13 animal record exclusion tested, VCNB gate, FSM, standard checks.

## TASK V-HLT-EXT-4: Community Health Worker (CHW) Network Vertical

- **Module / vertical:** `packages/verticals` + vertical slug `community-health`
- **Priority:** P3-Specialist — Nigeria's CHW programme is critical for rural health delivery; NPHCDA, state ministries of health, PHC (Primary Healthcare) coordination; over 100,000 CHWs nationwide
- **Milestone target:** M12
- **Primary pillars:** Pillar 1 (Ops) + Pillar 3 (Marketplace)
- **`primary_pillars` value:** `["ops","marketplace"]`
- **GitHub context:** (standard links)

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in community health management systems, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:**
- Nigerian community health system — NPHCDA (National Primary Health Care Development Agency), BHCPF (Basic Healthcare Provision Fund), VHW (Village Health Workers), community health extension workers (CHEWs); LGA-level health management; USSD-friendly design for rural workers; P13 strictly enforced for household health data
- CHW visit log, referral tracking, stock of essential medicines (stock units as integers), immunisation register
- Cloudflare Workers + Hono + D1 TypeScript strict mode; WebWaka SuperAgent integration; Verticals FSM engine
- **CRITICAL:** This vertical may have USSD users (rural CHWs); USSD sessions cannot have AI calls (P12)

---

**1. Mandatory context reading:** All standard documents plus ADL clinical AI cap. Note USSD usage by CHWs — design all routes to work without AI on USSD.

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Research tasks: Nigeria CHW programme — NPHCDA CHW deployment, BHCPF fund utilisation, community health visit data collection tools (DHIS2 used by FMOH); key features: CHW register (CHW_ID, LGA, ward, training_level), household visit log (household_ref_id — never address/name, visit_date, services_provided JSON, referral_flag), immunisation tally (vaccine_name, doses_administered INTEGER), stock register (medicine_name, unit_count INTEGER), referral log (referral_ref_id, referred_to, referral_date, outcome).

Execution plan:
- **Schema:** `community_health_profiles` (org_name, NPHCDA_affiliation, state_MOH_registration, LGA, workspace_id, tenant_id, status); `chw_workers` (chw_ref_id TEXT, training_level (CHW/CHEW/SCHEW), lga, ward, status, tenant_id); `chw_visits` (chw_ref_id, household_ref_id TEXT, visit_date INTEGER, services_provided JSON, referral_flag BOOLEAN, tenant_id); `chw_immunisation` (chw_ref_id, vaccine_name, doses_administered INTEGER, tally_date INTEGER, lga, ward, tenant_id); `chw_stock` (item_name, unit_count INTEGER, dispensed_count INTEGER, last_restocked INTEGER, tenant_id)
- **FSM:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `nphcda_registered` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `HEALTH_FACILITY_BENCHMARK` (aggregate visit coverage analysis) — L2 on operational stats only; **L3 HITL if any household data is referenced** — NDPR consent; **USSD sessions blocked (P12)** — rural USSD users must not trigger AI
- **KYC:** Tier 1 for CHW operations; no monetary transactions at this level
- **Regulatory hook:** NPHCDA affiliation + state MOH registration at `nphcda_registered`

---

**3. Implementation:** Branch `feat/vertical-community-health`. `registerCommunityHealthVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","marketplace"]`. No monetary transactions at this vertical (P9 still enforced for any future fee collection). Household_ref_id opaque UUID — never address or names (P13). USSD explicitly blocked for AI calls (P12) — standard data entry routes must function on USSD. Tenant scoped (T3).

---

**4. QA:** Register; FSM to `nphcda_registered`; CHW registered; visit logged with opaque household_ref_id; immunisation tally with integer doses; stock register with integer unit_count; AI coverage analysis with aiRights + NDPR (aggregate LGA stats only); household data in AI payload → P13 blocked; USSD session → AI blocked (P12); cross-tenant 403; invalid FSM typed error. Unauth 401. **Minimum: 15 tests.**

---

**5. Push:** `git commit -m "feat(vertical/community-health): CHW Network vertical — visit logs, immunisation, stock, P13/USSD safe (M12)"`. PR checklist: P13 household data exclusion tested; USSD-safe data entry routes verified; FSM, migration, standard checks.

## TASK V-HLT-EXT-5: Elderly Care Facility Vertical

- **Module / vertical:** `packages/verticals` + vertical slug `elderly-care`
- **Priority:** P3-Specialist — Growing elder care sector in Nigeria driven by urbanisation and diaspora-funded care for aging parents; FMHSW (Federal Ministry of Humanitarian Affairs) and state social welfare oversight
- **Milestone target:** M12
- **Primary pillars:** Pillar 1 (Ops) + Pillar 2 (Branding) + Pillar 3 (Marketplace)
- **`primary_pillars` value:** `["ops","branding","marketplace"]`
- **GitHub context:** (standard links)

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in elderly and long-term care management software, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:**
- Nigerian elderly care sector — FMHSW oversight, state social welfare departments, private care homes emerging in Lagos, Abuja; diaspora-funded care arrangements, welfare payments in kobo from diaspora sponsors
- Resident care plan reference, medication schedule reference (never clinical content to AI — P13), staff rota, billing in kobo per care period
- Cloudflare Workers + Hono + D1 TypeScript strict mode; WebWaka SuperAgent integration; Verticals FSM engine
- **CRITICAL P13:** Resident diagnoses, medications, clinical assessments must never reach AI layer. Only aggregate occupancy, revenue per room type.

---

**1. Mandatory context reading:** All standard documents plus ADL clinical AI cap.

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Research tasks: Nigeria elderly care market — FMHSW policy, private care homes in Lagos, diaspora transfer market for elder care fees, average monthly care cost (₦50,000–₦300,000); key features: resident register (resident_ref_id opaque), room management (room_number, room_type, monthly_rate_kobo), staff rota (care worker, shift), care plan reference (plan_ref_id — document stored elsewhere), billing (monthly_charge_kobo, payer_type: resident/family/diaspora/insurance), medication schedule reference (never content to AI), incident report reference.

Execution plan:
- **Schema:** `elderly_care_profiles` (facility_name, FMHSW_registration, state_social_welfare_cert, CAC_RC, bed_count INTEGER, workspace_id, tenant_id, status); `care_residents` (resident_ref_id TEXT, room_number TEXT, admission_date INTEGER, monthly_rate_kobo, payer_ref_id TEXT, status (active/discharged/deceased), tenant_id); `care_billing` (resident_ref_id, billing_period TEXT, monthly_charge_kobo, paid_kobo, outstanding_kobo, payment_date INTEGER, tenant_id); `care_staff_rota` (staff_name, role, shift_start INTEGER, shift_end INTEGER, tenant_id)
- **FSM:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `fmhsw_verified` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `HEALTH_FACILITY_BENCHMARK` (occupancy rate, revenue per room type) — L2 operational only; **L3 HITL if resident care metrics referenced** — NDPR consent; USSD excluded (P12)
- **KYC:** Tier 2 for monthly billing; Tier 3 for diaspora transfer-funded care above ₦5M/year

---

**3. Implementation:** Branch `feat/vertical-elderly-care`. `registerElderlyCareVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`. Kobo (P9). Resident_ref_id opaque. Clinical care plan stored as encrypted reference — never D1. Tenant scoped (T3). USSD excluded (P12).

---

**4. QA:** Register; FSM to `fmhsw_verified`; resident with integer monthly_rate_kobo; billing with integer monthly_charge_kobo; staff rota; AI occupancy report with aiRights + NDPR (aggregate room counts only); clinical data in AI payload → P13 blocked; fractional kobo rejected; cross-tenant 403; AI triply blocked; invalid FSM typed error. Unauth 401; KYC 403. **Minimum: 15 tests.**

---

**5. Push:** `git commit -m "feat(vertical/elderly-care): Elderly Care vertical — resident management, billing, P13-safe AI insights (M12)"`. PR checklist: P13 clinical data exclusion, FMHSW gate, standard checks.

## TASK V-HLT-EXT-6: Rehabilitation / Recovery Centre Vertical

- **Module / vertical:** `packages/verticals` + vertical slug `rehab-centre`
- **Priority:** P3-Specialist — Drug and alcohol rehabilitation centres are regulated by NDLEA; mental health rehabilitation by FMHSW; growing demand driven by Nigeria's substance abuse crisis
- **Milestone target:** M12

- **`primary_pillars` value:** `["ops","branding","marketplace"]`
- **GitHub context:** (standard links)

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in behavioural health and rehabilitation centre management, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:**
- Nigerian rehabilitation sector — NDLEA (National Drug Law Enforcement Agency) rehab centre licensing, FMHSW mental health division, NBTHCO (National Board for Technical and Vocation Education — counselling), private and government rehab centres
- **CRITICAL — MOST SENSITIVE DATA IN PLATFORM:** Rehabilitation and substance abuse records are the most sensitive category. P13 + L3 HITL mandatory for ALL AI calls. NDPR consent is mandatory. Resident identity must never appear in any data pipeline.
- Cloudflare Workers + Hono + D1 TypeScript strict mode; WebWaka SuperAgent integration; Verticals FSM engine

---

**1. Mandatory context reading:** All standard documents. **MANDATORY extra reads:**
- `docs/governance/platform-invariants.md` — P13 section read three times
- `docs/governance/ai-architecture-decision-log.md` — L3 HITL rule for clinical/sensitive content

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Research tasks: Nigerian rehab sector — NDLEA licensed facilities count, FMHSW mental health facility register, private vs government rehab split; average programme cost (₦300,000–₦2M per 3-month programme); key features: resident register (opaque resident_ref_id — NEVER name, condition, or diagnosis stored in primary DB), programme enrolment (programme_type, duration_days, total_fee_kobo, deposit_kobo), session log (session_date, facilitator_id, type — never content), family liaison contact (encrypted external storage), billing.

Execution plan:
- **Schema:** `rehab_centre_profiles` (centre_name, NDLEA_licence, FMHSW_registration, CAC_RC, bed_count INTEGER, workspace_id, tenant_id, status); `rehab_programmes` (programme_name, duration_days INTEGER, total_fee_kobo, programme_type (residential/outpatient), tenant_id); `rehab_enrolments` (resident_ref_id TEXT UNIQUE, programme_id, enrolment_date INTEGER, deposit_kobo, balance_kobo, status (active/completed/discharged_early/transferred), tenant_id); `rehab_sessions` (resident_ref_id, session_date INTEGER, facilitator_id, session_type (group/individual/family), tenant_id — NO session content stored)
- **FSM:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `ndlea_verified` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `HEALTH_FACILITY_BENCHMARK` (programme completion rate, occupancy) — **L3 HITL MANDATORY FOR ALL AI CALLS** — NDPR consent; USSD excluded (P12); only aggregate programme counts and completion rates — never resident_ref_id or any session detail
- **KYC:** Tier 3 mandatory — rehabilitation involves high-value fees and extremely sensitive data; full identity verification required

---

**3. Implementation:**

Branch: `feat/vertical-rehab-centre`. `registerRehabCentreVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`. **L3 HITL flag mandatory on ALL SuperAgent calls — no exceptions.** Resident_ref_id opaque UUID; no name, condition, or substance stored in D1 ever. All monetary in kobo (P9). Tenant scoped (T3). USSD excluded (P12).

---

**4. QA:**

**Test file:** `packages/verticals-rehab-centre/src/rehab-centre.test.ts`

Positive: register; FSM to `ndlea_verified`; programme with integer total_fee_kobo, duration_days; enrolment with integer deposit_kobo, balance_kobo; session logged with only session_type (no content); AI occupancy report with HITL flag + aiRights + NDPR (aggregate only). Negative: resident name in any DB field → schema validation error; HITL flag missing on AI call → blocked; fractional kobo; cross-tenant → 403; AI triply blocked; clinical detail in AI payload → P13 blocked; invalid FSM → typed error. Security: unauth → 401; Tier 3 KYC → 403 for lower tiers.

**CRITICAL TESTS:**
1. Any payload containing actual resident name, substance, or diagnosis is rejected at schema level (P13)
2. All SuperAgent calls from this vertical must have `autonomy_level: "L3_HITL"` — missing flag = blocking test failure

**Minimum test count: 15 tests.**

---

**5. Finalize and push:**

```bash
git commit -m "feat(vertical/rehab-centre): Rehab Centre vertical — programme management, NDLEA compliance, L3 HITL AI (M12)"
git push origin feat/vertical-rehab-centre
```
PR checklist:
- [ ] L3 HITL mandatory on ALL AI routes — blocking if missing
- [ ] No resident name, condition, or substance stored in any D1 column
- [ ] Opaque resident_ref_id UUID enforced throughout
- [ ] `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`
- [ ] PR labeled: `3in1:pillar-1`, `3in1:pillar-2`, `3in1:pillar-3`
- [ ] Tier 3 KYC enforced
- [ ] USSD exclusion enforced (P12); NDPR consent mandatory (P10)
- [ ] T3 on all D1 queries
- [ ] Tests ≥ 15, all passing including L3 HITL enforcement test and P13 schema test
- [ ] Zero typecheck errors (`pnpm -r typecheck`)
- [ ] Zero lint errors (`pnpm -r lint`)
